prompt: For basketball athletes in the offseason, how should plyometrics be integrated with hypertrophy and strength training?
assertions: Recommends placing plyometrics early in training sessions while athletes are fresh
Suggests approximately 1-2 focused plyo sessions per week
Warns against putting hard plyometric sessions on 'off days' or recovery days
Distinguishes quality high-intent plyometrics from high-rep fatigue jumping
Recommends keeping plyo volume low-to-moderate with high quality
